# Only the external libraries FulcrumFS.Videos needs (see FFprobeUtils.cs); everything else is built
# into ffmpeg. --disable-autodetect stops the suite from linking libraries that merely happen to be
# present in MSYS2. zlib is required by the png encoder; libzimg by the zscale filter.
--disable-autodetect
--enable-gpl
--enable-nonfree
--enable-zlib
--enable-libx264
--enable-libx265
--enable-libfdk-aac
--enable-libzimg
--disable-debug
